abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: May use Grace instead of Might for Melee or Pugilism attacks.

abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

abilities.name: Inviting Allure
abilities.description: When character within a6 becomes Slow, may discard card to force it to move yards equal to its Walk toward this character.

abilities.name: Manipulative (10)
abilities.description: When enemy targets this character, they must pass TN 10 Willpower Challenge. On failure, may change target to legal target of choice.

actions: (1) Fancy Cane (Melee) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/2/4 damage. Severe damage inflicts Weak Critical Effect. Ram Out Clubbing: After damaging, target knocked Prone, take action again vs same target.

(1) Undress (Bewitch) | AV: 6T (12T) | Rg: 6 | Resist: Wp | Living target becomes Slow. Tome Burlesque Show: Living characters within p3 must make TN 13 Centering Challenge or become Slow. Mask Confusing Feelings: After succeeding, target gains Confusing Feelings until end of next turn.
system.notes: Undead performers reanimated by necromancers. Retain grace and showmanship. Walk with confident strides not shambling. Seductive manner can freeze attackers.
